name: components/drawer
description: A slide-out panel that enters from any screen edge (top, bottom, left, right) and overlays the main content. Provides a complete composition system with Drawer, DrawerTrigger, DrawerClose, DrawerContent, DrawerLabel, DrawerDescription, DrawerHeader, and DrawerFooter. Features a draggable handle for bottom drawers, dynamic overlay opacity tied to open percentage, and smooth cubic-bezier transitions. Built on Corvu Drawer with full ARIA dialog semantics and responsive sizing.
useCases: Mobile navigation menus that slide in from the left or right edge
Bottom sheets for filter panels, date pickers, or action lists on touch devices
Detail sidebars on desktop that reveal record properties when a table row is selected
Checkout carts and notification centers that overlay without disrupting browsing context
usage: import { Drawer, DrawerTrigger, DrawerClose, DrawerContent, DrawerLabel, DrawerDescription, DrawerHeader, DrawerFooter, DrawerPortal } from "shadcn-solid-components/components/drawer"
